title: Dashboard styling QA pass
items: Separated desktop navbar links from the mobile drawer so Menu and Account drawer groups no longer appear in the desktop topbar.
Moved the unsaved changes save bar near the server page header as a normal in-flow glass card instead of a viewport-fixed overlay.
Tightened status pill height, moderation bypass spacing, automation rule card rhythm and dashboard footer credits alignment across desktop and mobile.

title: Dashboard chrome flow fix
items: Neutralized remaining sticky dashboard topbar/sidebar positioning so navigation behaves as normal page layout instead of overlay chrome.
Forced the unsaved changes controls to render inline inside the dashboard flow and only keep toasts as temporary floating feedback.
Kept the mobile drawer as the only intentional overlay while preserving desktop dashboard layout.

title: Dashboard layout flow polish
items: Moved the global navbar back into the normal page layout flow so it pushes dashboard content down instead of feeling like an overlay.
Changed the unsaved changes controls into an inline dashboard save section that appears only when drafts exist.
Kept toast notifications reserved for temporary saved, failed, and read-only feedback messages.

items.text: Refactored server dashboard edits into a shared per-server draft state with one contextual unsaved changes bar.
Kept hash-based server tabs lazy-loaded and cached while preserving draft changes between tab switches.
Fixed channel normalization imports so dashboard channel selects no longer crash when rendering previews.
Added safer fallbacks for role, level reward and moderation bypass APIs so failed data does not lock pages in loading states.
Reworked the mobile drawer final override with compact Tailwind-style rows, a subtle active state and responsive sizing.

title: Mobile drawer cleanup and dashboard helper fixes
items: Finished the global mobile drawer reset so legacy dashboard drawer styles no longer duplicate account labels or create giant active cards.
Restored shared guild channel and role helpers after the component split so server pages no longer fail with missing textChannels or guildRoles errors.
Added stronger responsive overrides for the mobile navbar, drawer rows, account section and dashboard spacing without using fixed phone-specific sizes.

title: Component structure and mobile drawer refactor
items: Split repeated dashboard UI helpers into reusable form, feedback, access-list and mobile-drawer components.
Rebuilt the shared mobile drawer markup so every page uses the same compact navigation rows, account section and close control.
Added final responsive drawer CSS overrides to remove giant active cards, reduce empty spacing and keep the layout fluid across phone sizes.

title: Server dashboard tabs and API reliability
items: Refactored server tab links to use one server route with URL hashes so switching tabs does not reload the whole dashboard page.
Added in-memory tab data caching so tab API data is lazy-loaded when opened and reused when switching back.
Improved mobile navigation drawer into a compact slide-over with row-based active states and better menu/account hierarchy.
Improved moderation bypass loading/error states and spacing for automation cards.
Connected level reward role APIs to real bot endpoints so role data no longer returns 404 when the bot update is deployed.

title: Responsive Tailwind-style mobile menu rework
items: Rebuilt the mobile navigation drawer as a flexible slide-over with compact rows, clear menu/account hierarchy and no giant active cards.
Improved mobile drawer behavior with responsive width, safe-area-aware spacing, dimmed page overlay and a clearer close control.
Fixed changelog rendering so entries using title/items display properly and empty date-only cards are hidden.

title: Mobile drawer and loading polish
items: Refined the mobile navigation drawer with compact responsive rows, a clearer active state and a bottom anchored account section.
Reduced mobile dashboard header, tabs, cards, form controls and footer spacing without changing the desktop layout.
Expanded skeleton loading states so dashboard, settings and server pages show loading structure instead of plain text.

title: Mobile navigation drawer redesign
items: Made the mobile drawer compact with grouped navigation rows instead of oversized vertical spacing.
Changed the active menu item into a consistent selected row rather than a large card.
Added menu/account hierarchy labels, improved the close button visibility and kept the account controls anchored to the bottom.

title: Mobile drawer spacing fix
items: Grouped mobile menu links with fluid spacing.
Prevented active drawer items from expanding into oversized cards.
Kept the account block anchored at the bottom of the drawer.

title: Fluid mobile drawer spacing
items: Reworked the mobile navigation drawer with responsive spacing instead of device-specific fixed gaps.
Kept menu links compact on tall phones while preserving comfortable touch targets on smaller screens.
Prevented the drawer overlay from compressing or shifting dashboard content while open.

title: Moderation bypass and mobile polish
items: Added moderation bypass access management with default bot owner and Manage Server users.
Added username search/autocomplete for AI image access and moderation bypass user pickers.
Kept Discord ID entry for manual user additions.
Tightened the mobile hamburger button and aligned dashboard switches.
